text: 4228 - وَ شَكَا رَجُلٌ إِلَى اَلنَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ اَلْوَحْشَةَ فَأَمَرَهُ بِاتِّخَاذِ زَوْجِ حَمَامٍ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4228 - A man complained to the Prophet, peace and blessings be upon him and his family, about feeling lonely.
The Prophet, peace and blessings be upon him and his family, instructed him:
"Keep a pair of pigeons."
